name: RvPaws Mouse Cat Toy for Cats and Kittens (Pack of 2)
description: RvPaw Size: Small - cat mice toy is a safe indoor prey, awaken your cat's natural hunting instinct, and fueling your cat's desire to stalk and chase, it’s a great stress relief toy for cats to keep them healthy and active. Your cat will play, scratch and chew on these fun catnip toys, not your furniture!
